  • Field Details

    • standardGrammar

      private final AbstractGrammar standardGrammar

  • Constructor Details

    • ExtnUnicityChecker

      public ExtnUnicityChecker(AbstractGrammar standardGrammar)

  • Method Details

    • isUsedSymbol

      public boolean isUsedSymbol(String symbol, Set<IFormulaExtension> extns)
      Tests if a symbol is used in a set of extensions. This will only test if the symbol appears in the set of extensions or the standard grammar. The unicity of the extension symbols among each other is not tested. To do so, use checkUnicity(Set).
      Parameters:
      symbol - symbol to check
      extns - extensions to consider
      Returns:
      whether the symbol is used in the extensions

    • isUsedId

      public boolean isUsedId(String id, Set<IFormulaExtension> extns)
      Tests if an ID is used in a set of extensions. This will only test if the ID appears in the set of extensions or the standard grammar. The unicity of the extension IDs among each other is not tested. To do so, use checkUnicity(Set).
      Parameters:
      id - id to check
      extns - extensions to consider
      Returns:
      whether the id is used in the extensions

    • checkUnicity

      public void checkUnicity(Set<IFormulaExtension> extns)

    • checkSymbolUnicity

      private void checkSymbolUnicity(Set<IFormulaExtension> extns)

    • checkIdUnicity

      private void checkIdUnicity(Set<IFormulaExtension> extns)

    • processInvalid

      private static void processInvalid(IFormulaExtension newExtn, String reason)
